name: Infantry
description: Basic foot soldiers forming the backbone of every army. Recruited from the draft pool generated by Barracks — no direct money cost.

name: Archers
description: Ranged skirmishers who weaken enemy formations before contact. High offensive value but fragile in direct combat.

name: Pikemen
description: Heavy infantry armed with long pikes. Exceptional at holding defensive lines and punishing cavalry charges.

name: Knights
description: Elite heavy cavalry clad in full plate. Devastating in open battle but costly to equip and maintain. Requires an Armory.
